Rust (programming language)
memory-safe programming language without garbage collection
www.rust-lang.org

Rust (programming language) ... Rust is a general-purpose programming language which emphasizes performance, type safety, concurrency, and memory safety. Rust supports multiple programming paradigms. It was influenced by ideas from functional programming, including immutability, higher-order functions, algebraic data types, and pattern matching.

Wikipedia

Fact sheet

Beta
At a glance

Developer

Rust Project

Platform

Cross-platform

First appeared

May 15, 2015

Stable release

1.81.0 / September 5, 2024

Details

Paradigms

  • Concurrent
  • Functional
  • Generic
  • Imperative
  • Structured

Typing discipline

  • Affine
  • Inferred
  • Nominal
  • Static
  • Strong

Implementation language

OCaml (2006–2011) Rust (2012–present)

OS

Cross-platform

License

MIT, Apache 2.0

Filename extensions

.rs,.rlib

Influenced by

Alef C# C++ Cyclone Elm Erlang Haskell Limbo Newsqueak OCaml Ruby Scheme Standard ML Swift

Influenced

Idris Project Verona Spark Swift V Zig

Profiles

X (Twitter)

GitHub

YouTube

Bluesky

The only aim in Rust is to survive. Everything wants you to die - the island’s wildlife and other inhabitants, the environment, other survivors. Do whatever it takes to last another night.

Rust - Download
Rust is a PvP-driven game with deep crafting systems and unforgiving mechanics. It makes every decision a matter of life and death, whether forming alliances or engaging in all-out warfare, delivering a chaotic, unpredictable experience that constantly keeps you on edge.

Rust (video game) - Wikipedia
Rust is a 2018 multiplayer survival video game developed by Facepunch Studios. It was first released in early access in December 2013 and received its full release in February 2018. Rust is available on Windows and macOS. Console versions for PlayStation 4 and Xbox One developed in conjunction with Double Eleven were released in May 2021.

Wikipedia

Rust (video game) - Wikipedia

Rust is a 2018 multiplayer survival video game developed by Facepunch Studios. It was first released in early access in December 2013 and received its full release in February 2018. Rust is available on Windows and macOS. Console versions for PlayStation 4 and Xbox One developed in conjunction with Double Eleven were released in May 2021.
